title: Resolution Adopting Republic Act No. 10699: an Act Expanding the Coverage of Incentives Granted to National Athletes and Coaches, Appropriating Funds Therefor, Repealing for the Purpose Republic Act No. 9064, Also Known As the ?national Athletes, Coaches and Trainers Benefits and Incentives Act of 2001? or ?sports Benefits and Incentives Act of 2001?.
